name: DHS Mancherial – STLS and Lab Technician Gr.II – 4 Posts

basic_details.job_title: DHS Mancherial Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for STLS and Lab Technician Gr.II Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Mancherial (DHS Mancherial) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of STLS and Lab Technician Gr.II. Candidates with B.Sc, DMLT Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 21-05-2026, and closes on 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DHS Mancherial official website mancherial.telangana.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in Science (BSC) with MLT or DMLT for STLS, Intermediate (10+2) with Biology and Physics, DMLT or B.Sc. MLT, registered with Telangana Para Medical Board for Lab Technician Gr.II

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Mancherial Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
